message:
refactor(freeze): remove C dependency, use Zig frozen_module exclusively

- Remove frozen_functions.c from wasm_static build target
- Update wasm_main_static.zig to import frozen_module directly
- Use named module import for math_polyfill to avoid path conflicts

The C frozen functions are no longer linked. All frozen functions
now come from the Zig frozen_module.zig which provides frozen_init_c()
with C calling convention for compatibility.

Note: frozen_functions.c is still generated for the CLOSURE_MANIFEST
which patch_closure_hooks.js reads. A future change will extract the
manifest to a separate JSON file.
